heading: Annual reports on certain cyber vulnerabilities procured by intelligence community and foreign commercial providers of cyber vulnerabilities
label: 3242 Annual reports on certain cyber vulnerabilities procured by intelligence community and foreign commercial providers of cyber vulnerabilities

children.heading: Annual reports
children.label: a Annual reports
children.text: On an annual basis through 2026, the Director of the Central Intelligence Agency and the Director of the National Security Agency, in coordination with the Director of National Intelligence, shall jointly submit to the congressional intelligence committees a report containing information on foreign commercial providers and the cyber vulnerabilities procured by the intelligence community through foreign commercial providers.

children.label: C
children.text: whether the procurement consisted of only that vulnerability or included other vulnerabilities;

children.label: E
children.text: the identity of the commercial provider and, if the commercial provider was not the original supplier of the vulnerability, a description of the original supplier;

children.label: F
children.text: the country of origin of the vulnerability; and

children.label: G
children.text: an assessment of the ability of the intelligence community to use the vulnerability, including whether such use will be operational or for research and development, and the approximate timeline for such use.

children.label: A
children.text: pose a significant threat to the national security of the United States; or

children.label: i
children.text: has used the cyber vulnerabilities to target United States persons, the United States Government, journalists, or dissidents; or

children.label: ii
children.text: has an established pattern or practice of violating human rights or suppressing dissent.

An assessment of whether the intelligence community has conducted business with the foreign commercial providers identified under paragraph (2) during the 5-year period preceding the date of the report.

children.heading: Form
children.label: c Form
children.text: Each report under subsection (a) may be submitted in classified form.

children.heading: Commercial provider
children.label: 1 Commercial provider
children.text: The term “commercial provider” means any person that sells, or acts as a broker, for a cyber vulnerability.

children.heading: Cyber vulnerability
children.label: 2 Cyber vulnerability
children.text: The term “cyber vulnerability” means any tool, exploit, vulnerability, or code that is intended to compromise a device, network, or system, including such a tool, exploit, vulnerability, or code procured by the intelligence community for purposes of research and development.
